question.en: How do I get tickets to attend the event?
question.ja: チケットはどこで買えるの？

answer.en: You can get your tickets through our official website. Simply click the Get Ticket button and follow the registration process. E-tickets will be sent to your email and WhatsApp after purchase.
answer.id: Langsung melalui website ini. Klik tombol Get Ticket, ikuti prosesnya, dan e-ticket akan dikirim ke email dan WhatsApp kamu.
answer.ja: 公式サイトのチケット購入ボタンから手続きできます。購入後、EチケットがEmailとWhatsAppに届きます。
answer.ko: 공식 웹사이트의 티켓 받기 버튼을 눌러서 진행하면 돼요. 전자 티켓이 Email과 WhatsApp으로 발송돼요.
answer.zh: 在官网点 领取门票，按流程操作就行。电子门票会发到你的 Email 和 WhatsApp。

question.en: How much does a ticket cost?
question.ja: チケットはいくら？

answer.en: Ticket prices vary depending on the ticket type (one-day pass, full event pass, VIP, etc.) and promotional period. Please visit our Ticket page for the most up-to-date pricing. Don't miss our early bird promotions!
answer.id: Harga tergantung jenis tiket (one-day pass, full event pass, VIP, dll.) dan periode promo. Cek langsung di halaman Tiket untuk harga terkini. Jangan lewatkan promo early bird!
answer.ja: チケットの種類（1日券、通し券、VIPなど）や時期によって異なります。最新価格はチケットページをチェック。早割がお得です！
answer.ko: 티켓 종류(1일권, 전체 이용권, VIP 등)와 판매 기간에 따라 달라요. 최신 가격은 티켓 페이지에서 확인하세요. 얼리버드 할인 놓치지 마세요!
answer.zh: 价格根据票种（单日票、全程票、VIP 等）和购买时间不同。最新价格看 门票页面。早鸟票更划算，别错过！

question.en: Can I get a refund if I can't attend?
question.id: Apakah tiket bisa direfund kalau tidak jadi datang?
question.ja: 行けなくなったら返金できる？
question.ko: 못 가게 되면 환불 받을 수 있나요?

answer.en: All ticket sales are final. There are no refunds or exchanges once a ticket has been purchased. Please review our Ticket Refund and Return Policy for more details.
answer.id: Semua penjualan tiket bersifat final. Tidak ada refund atau penukaran. Selengkapnya ada di Kebijakan Refund dan Pengembalian Tiket.
answer.ja: 購入後の返金・交換はできません。詳しくはチケット返金ポリシーをご確認ください。
answer.ko: 구매 완료된 티켓은 환불이나 교환이 안 돼요. 자세한 건 티켓 환불 정책을 확인해 주세요.
answer.zh: 门票售出后不退不换。详情看 退票政策。

question.en: What should I bring to the event?
question.ja: 当日は何を持っていけばいい？

answer.en: Please bring your e-ticket (digital or printed) to be exchanged for a badge or wristband at the registration counter. Don't forget to bring your camera for photos with cosplayers and at photo spots!
answer.id: Bawa e-ticket kamu (di HP atau print) untuk ditukar jadi badge atau wristband di meja registrasi. Jangan lupa kamera untuk foto bersama cosplayer dan di photo spot!
answer.ja: Eチケット（スマホ画面or印刷）を受付でバッジまたはリストバンドと交換します。コスプレイヤーとの撮影用にカメラもお忘れなく！
answer.ko: 전자 티켓(스마트폰 화면 또는 출력)을 가져오면 등록 데스크에서 배지나 입장 밴드로 교환해 드려요. 코스플레이어랑 사진 찍을 카메라도 챙겨오세요!
answer.zh: 带上电子门票（手机出示或打印），到签到台换入场证。还有，别忘了带相机，跟 Cosplayer 合影、打卡拍照点！

question.en: Is cosplay allowed at the event?
question.ja: コスプレしてもいい？

answer.en: Absolutely! Cosplay is highly encouraged and welcomed. We love seeing creative costumes from your favorite characters. Please note that prop weapons must be peace-bonded and approved by security. Check our Event Policy for cosplay guidelines.
answer.id: Tentu boleh! Bahkan sangat disarankan. Kami sangat senang melihat kostum kreatif dari karakter favorit kalian. Satu hal: prop senjata harus di-peace bond dan lolos security check. Detail lengkap di Event Policy.
answer.ja: もちろん！むしろ大歓迎です。お気に入りキャラの衣装で来てください。ただし、武器の小道具はセキュリティチェックと安全処理が必要です。詳しくはイベントポリシーへ。
answer.ko: 물론이죠! 코스프레 적극 환영해요. 좋아하는 캐릭터 의상으로 오세요. 소품 무기는 안전 처리 후 보안 검사를 통과해야 해요. 자세한 건 행사 정책을 확인해 주세요.
answer.zh: 当然！Cosplay 大力欢迎。穿上你最爱角色的战袍来吧。注意：道具武器要做安全处理，通过安检。详细规则看 活动政策。

question.en: Will there be cosplay competitions?
question.ja: コスプレ大会はある？

answer.en: Yes! We organize cosplay competitions with exciting prizes. Check our Rundown page for competition schedules, registration deadlines, and categories.
answer.id: Tentu ada! Selalu ada kompetisi cosplay dengan hadiah keren. Jadwal, batas pendaftaran, dan kategori bisa kamu cek di halaman Rundown.
answer.ja: あります！豪華賞品付きのコスプレ大会を開催。スケジュール、エントリー締切、カテゴリーはスケジュールページで確認してね。
answer.ko: 네! 푸짐한 상품이 걸린 코스프레 대회가 있어요. 일정, 접수 마감, 부문별 정보는 일정 페이지에서 확인하세요.
answer.zh: 有！奖品丰厚的 Cosplay 比赛每次都有。比赛时间、报名截止和参赛类别看 日程页面。

question.en: Who can attend the event?
question.ja: 誰でも参加できる？

answer.en: Everyone is welcome! Whether you're a hardcore fan, casual enthusiast, collector, artist, or just curious about pop culture, anime, comics, and gaming, there's something for everyone at our event!
answer.id: Semua orang! Hardcore fan, casual enthusiast, kolektor, artist, atau yang baru penasaran dengan pop culture, anime, komik, dan gaming. Di sini ada sesuatu untuk semua orang.
answer.ja: 誰でもウェルカム！ガチ勢もにわかも、コレクターもアーティストも。ポップカルチャー、アニメ、漫画、ゲームに少しでも興味があれば楽しめます。
answer.ko: 누구나 환영해요! 하드코어 팬, 가볍게 즐기러 온 분, 컬렉터, 아티스트, 팝 컬처 궁금한 분 모두 즐길 수 있어요.
answer.zh: 谁都能来！铁杆粉丝、休闲爱好者、收藏家、画师，或者就是好奇想来看看的，这里有适合每个人的东西。

question.en: What can I expect to find at the event?
question.id: Apa saja yang ada di event?
question.ja: 会場ではどんなことができるの？

answer.en: You'll find merchandise booths, artist alleys, gaming zones, photo opportunities, stage performances, meet & greets with special guests, cosplay competitions, and much more! Check our Exhibitors page for the full list.
answer.id: Booth merchandise, artist alley, gaming zone, photo spot, panggung live, meet & greet dengan guest spesial, kompetisi cosplay, dan masih banyak lagi. Cek halaman Exhibitors untuk daftar lengkapnya.
answer.ja: グッズ販売ブース、アーティストアレイ、ゲームゾーン、フォトスポット、ステージライブ、スペシャルゲストとのMeet & Greet、コスプレ大会など盛りだくさん！出展者ページで全リストを確認できます。
answer.ko: 굿즈 부스, Artist Alley, 게이밍 존, 포토존, 무대 공연, 스페셜 게스트 Meet & Greet, 코스프레 대회까지! 전체 목록은 참가사 페이지에서 확인하세요.
answer.zh: 周边摊位、Artist Alley、游戏区、拍照打卡点、舞台演出、嘉宾 Meet & Greet、Cosplay 比赛，还有更多！完整名单看 参展商页面。

question.en: Will there be special guests or celebrity appearances?
question.ja: スペシャルゲストは来る？

answer.en: Yes! We invite special guests including voice actors, artists, content creators, and industry professionals. Guest announcements will be made on our social media and News page. Stay tuned!
answer.id: Pasti! Kami undang voice actor, artist, content creator, dan profesional industri. Pengumuman guest selalu lewat sosmed dan halaman News. Stay tuned!
answer.ja: 来ます！声優、アーティスト、クリエイター、業界プロなど特別ゲストを招待しています。ゲスト発表はSNSとNewsページで。お楽しみに！
answer.ko: 네! 성우, 아티스트, 크리에이터, 업계 전문가 등 스페셜 게스트를 초청해요. 공개는 소셜 미디어와 News 페이지에서! 기대해 주세요!
answer.zh: 有！我们邀请了声优、画师、创作者和业内大咖。嘉宾阵容会在社交媒体和 资讯页面 公布，敬请关注！

question.en: How can I become an exhibitor or artist?
question.id: Bagaimana cara jadi exhibitor atau ikut artist alley?
question.ja: 出展者やアーティストとして参加するには？
question.zh: 怎么报名参展或当 Artist？

answer.en: To become an exhibitor or apply for the Artist Alley, please visit our Registration page or contact our team via WhatsApp for more information.
answer.id: Kunjungi halaman Registrasi atau hubungi tim kami lewat WhatsApp.
answer.ja: 出展者登録ページから申し込むか、WhatsAppでチームに連絡してください。
answer.ko: 전시 참가 신청 페이지에서 신청하거나, WhatsApp으로 문의해 주세요.
answer.zh: 去 参展商报名页面 提交申请，或通过 WhatsApp 联系我们。

question.en: Are there age restrictions for the event?
question.ja: 年齢制限はある？

answer.en: The event is family-friendly and open to all ages. Children under a certain age may enter free when accompanied by a paying adult. Please check our Ticket page for specific age policies.
answer.id: Event ini family-friendly dan terbuka untuk semua umur. Anak-anak di bawah usia tertentu bisa masuk gratis jika bersama orang dewasa yang memiliki tiket. Detailnya di halaman Tiket.
answer.ja: ファミリー向けイベントで年齢制限はありません。チケットを持つ保護者同伴のお子さまは無料入場も可能です。詳しくはチケットページへ。
answer.ko: 가족 모두 즐길 수 있는 행사예요. 특정 나이 이하 어린이는 티켓 소지 보호자와 함께 무료 입장 가능해요. 자세한 건 티켓 페이지에서 확인하세요.
answer.zh: 全家都能来，没有年龄限制。特定年龄以下的小朋友在持票成人陪同下可免费入场。具体看 门票页面。

question.en: Is there parking available at the venue?
question.ja: 会場に駐車場はある？

answer.en: Yes, the venue provides parking facilities. However, we recommend arriving early as parking spaces fill up quickly, especially on weekends. Consider using public transportation or ride-sharing services.
answer.id: Ada. Namun datanglah lebih awal, apalagi saat weekend, parkir bisa cepat penuh. Bisa juga menggunakan transportasi umum atau ride-sharing.
answer.ja: あります。ただし特に週末は混み合うので、早めに来るのがおすすめ。公共交通機関やライドシェアも便利です。
answer.ko: 네, 주차 시설이 있어요. 다만 주말에는 자리가 빨리 차니까 일찍 오시는 걸 추천해요. 대중교통이나 택시 이용도 좋아요.
answer.zh: 有。不过周末车位紧张，建议早点到。也可以打车或坐公共交通。

question.en: Can I take photos or videos at the event?
question.ja: 写真や動画は撮っていい？

answer.en: Personal photography and video recording are allowed and encouraged! Please be respectful when photographing cosplayers and always ask for permission. Professional or commercial recording requires written permission from the organizer.
answer.id: Tentu boleh! Foto dan video pribadi sangat dianjurkan. Kalau mau foto cosplayer, minta izin terlebih dahulu. Untuk keperluan profesional atau komersial, diperlukan izin tertulis dari panitia.
answer.ja: 個人利用なら大歓迎！コスプレイヤーの撮影は必ず許可をもらってね。商用目的の撮影には主催者の書面許可が必要です。
answer.ko: 개인 촬영은 얼마든지! 코스플레이어 촬영 시에는 먼저 동의를 구해 주세요. 상업 목적 촬영은 주최 측 사전 허가가 필요해요.
answer.zh: 个人拍照录像随便拍！拍 Cosplayer 记得先打招呼。商业拍摄需要主办方书面许可。

question.en: How can I stay updated about the event?
question.ja: 最新情報はどこで確認できる？

answer.en: Follow us on Instagram {'@'}{{instagram}} for the latest updates, guest announcements, and exclusive content. You can also check our News page.
answer.id: Follow Instagram kami {'@'}{{instagram}} buat update, pengumuman guest, dan konten eksklusif. Atau cek halaman News.
answer.ja: Instagram {'@'}{{instagram}}をフォロー。ゲスト発表や限定情報をいち早くゲットできます。Newsページもチェックしてね。
answer.ko: Instagram {'@'}{{instagram}}을 팔로우하면 게스트 공개, 독점 콘텐츠를 먼저 받아볼 수 있어요. News 페이지도 확인해 보세요.
answer.zh: 关注 Instagram {'@'}{{instagram}}，第一时间获取嘉宾公布和独家内容。也可以看 资讯页面。

question.en: How do I contact the organizer?
question.ja: 主催者への連絡方法は？

answer.en:
You can reach us through:

  • WhatsApp: Click here to chat
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

Visit our Help Center for more contact options.
answer.id:
Bisa lewat:

  • WhatsApp: Klik di sini
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

Atau cek Help Center buat opsi lainnya.
answer.ja:
こちらからどうぞ：

  • WhatsApp: チャットする
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

他の連絡手段はヘルプセンターへ。
answer.ko:
아래 방법으로 연락해 주세요:

  • WhatsApp: 여기를 클릭해서 채팅
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

고객센터에서 더 많은 연락 방법을 확인할 수 있어요.
answer.zh:
通过以下方式联系：

  • WhatsApp: 点击聊天
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

更多联系方式看 帮助中心。

question.en: When and where will {{event_title}} take place?
question.ja: {{event_title}}はいつ、どこで開催？

answer.en: {{event_title}} will be held on {{event_date}}, from {{event_time}}, at {{event_location}}.
answer.id: {{event_title}} diadakan tanggal {{event_date}}, jam {{event_time}}, di {{event_location}}.
answer.ja: {{event_title}}は{{event_date}}、{{event_time}}に{{event_location}}で開催されます。
answer.ko: {{event_title}}은(는) {{event_date}}, {{event_time}}에 {{event_location}}에서 열려요.
answer.zh: {{event_title}} 将于 {{event_date}}，{{event_time}} 在 {{event_location}} 举办。

question.en: How do I get tickets to attend the event?
question.ja: チケットの買い方は？

answer.en: You can get your tickets through our official website. Simply click the Get Ticket button and follow the registration process. E-tickets will be sent to your email and WhatsApp after purchase.
answer.id: Langsung ke website resmi kami dan klik Get Ticket. Ikuti langkah registrasinya, dan e-ticket akan dikirim ke email serta WhatsApp kamu.
answer.ja: 公式サイトのチケット購入ボタンから登録してね。購入後、EチケットがEmailとWhatsAppに届きます。
answer.ko: 공식 사이트에서 티켓 받기 버튼을 클릭하고 등록하면 돼요. 전자 티켓은 Email과 WhatsApp으로 보내드려요.
answer.zh: 在官网点 领取门票，按步骤完成注册就行。电子门票会发到你的 Email 和 WhatsApp。

question.en: How much does a ticket cost?
question.ja: チケットはいくら？

answer.en: Ticket prices vary depending on the ticket type (one-day pass, full event pass, VIP, etc.) and promotional period. Please visit our Ticket page for the most up-to-date pricing. Don't miss our early bird promotions!
answer.id: Tergantung jenis tiket (one-day pass, full event pass, VIP, dll.) dan periode pembelian. Cek halaman Tiket untuk harga terbaru. Jangan lewatkan early bird!
answer.ja: チケットの種類（1日券、通し券、VIPなど）や時期によって異なります。最新価格はチケットページをチェック。早割もあるよ！
answer.ko: 티켓 종류(1일권, 전일권, VIP 등)와 구매 시기에 따라 달라요. 최신 가격은 티켓 페이지에서 확인하세요. 얼리버드 할인도 놓치지 마세요!
answer.zh: 价格取决于票种（单日票、全程票、VIP 等）和购买时间。最新价格看 门票页面。别错过早鸟优惠！

question.en: Can I get a refund if I can't attend?
question.id: Apakah tiket bisa di-refund jika tidak jadi datang?
question.ja: 行けなくなったら返金できる？

answer.en: All ticket sales are final. There are no refunds or exchanges once a ticket has been purchased. Please review our Ticket Refund and Return Policy for more details.
answer.id: Tiket yang sudah dibeli tidak bisa di-refund atau ditukar. Lengkapnya, baca Kebijakan Refund Tiket.
answer.ja: 購入後の返金・交換はできません。詳しくはチケット返金ポリシーをご確認ください。
answer.ko: 구매한 티켓은 환불이나 교환이 안 돼요. 자세한 내용은 티켓 환불 정책을 확인해 주세요.
answer.zh: 门票售出后不退不换。详情见 退票政策。

question.en: What should I bring to the event?
question.id: Apa yang harus dibawa ke event?
question.ja: 当日は何を持っていけばいい？

answer.en: Please bring your e-ticket (digital or printed) to be exchanged for a badge or wristband at the registration counter. Don't forget to bring your camera for photos with cosplayers and at photo spots!
answer.id: Bawa e-ticket kamu (digital atau print) untuk ditukar menjadi badge atau wristband di meja registrasi. Jangan lupa bawa kamera untuk foto bersama cosplayer!
answer.ja: Eチケット（スマホ画面か印刷）を受付でバッジかリストバンドに交換してね。コスプレイヤーとの撮影用にカメラもお忘れなく！
answer.ko: 전자 티켓(화면 또는 출력)을 등록 데스크에서 배지나 밴드로 교환하면 돼요. 코스플레이어랑 사진 찍을 카메라도 챙기세요!
answer.zh: 带上电子门票（手机出示或打印），在签到台换入场证。别忘了带相机，和 Cosplayer 合影、在拍照点打卡！

question.en: Is cosplay allowed at the event?
question.ja: コスプレしていい？

answer.en: Absolutely! Cosplay is highly encouraged and welcomed. We love seeing creative costumes from your favorite characters. Please note that prop weapons must be peace-bonded and approved by security. Check our Event Policy for cosplay guidelines.
answer.id: Wajib malah! Cosplay sangat dianjurkan di sini. Tampilkan karakter favorit kamu. Satu hal: prop senjata harus di-peace bond dan lolos security check. Cek Event Policy untuk detailnya.
answer.ja: もちろん！コスプレ大歓迎です。好きなキャラの衣装で来てね。武器プロップはピースボンド処理とセキュリティチェックが必要です。詳しくはイベントポリシーで。
answer.ko: 당연하죠! 코스프레 대환영이에요. 좋아하는 캐릭터 의상으로 와주세요. 소품 무기는 Peace Bond 처리 후 보안팀 승인을 받아야 해요. 자세한 규칙은 행사 정책에서 확인하세요.
answer.zh: 当然！Cosplay 超级欢迎！穿上你最爱角色的服装来吧。注意：道具武器要经过 Peace Bond 处理，并通过安保审核。具体规则见 活动政策。

question.en: Will there be cosplay competitions?
question.ja: コスプレ大会はある？

answer.en: Yes! We organize cosplay competitions with exciting prizes. Check our Rundown page for competition schedules, registration deadlines, and categories.
answer.id: Pasti ada! Hadiahnya pun tidak main-main. Cek jadwal, deadline registrasi, dan kategori di halaman Rundown.
answer.ja: あるよ！豪華賞品付きのコスプレ大会を開催。スケジュールや参加方法はタイムテーブルをチェック。
answer.ko: 있어요! 푸짐한 상품도 준비됐어요. 대회 일정과 접수 정보는 타임테이블에서 확인하세요.
answer.zh: 有！奖品丰厚。比赛时间、报名截止、分组信息看 活动日程。

question.en: Who can attend the event?
question.ja: 誰でも来れる？

answer.en: Everyone is welcome! Whether you're a hardcore fan, casual enthusiast, collector, artist, or just curious about pop culture, anime, comics, and gaming, there's something for everyone at our event!
answer.id: Semua orang! Hardcore otaku, casual anime fans, kolektor, artist, atau yang baru mengenal dunia anime dan pop culture. Semua pasti menemukan sesuatu yang seru.
answer.ja: 誰でも大歓迎！コアなオタクもライトファンも、コレクターもクリエイターも。アニメやマンガ、ゲームが少しでも気になるなら、きっと楽しめるよ。
answer.ko: 네, 누구나 환영해요! 하드코어 오타쿠도, 가벼운 팬도, 컬렉터도, 아티스트도. 애니메나 만화, 게임에 관심이 조금이라도 있다면 즐길 거리가 가득해요!
answer.zh: 谁都欢迎！硬核宅、轻度爱好者、收藏家、创作者，或者只是对动漫、漫画、游戏好奇，这里都有适合你的内容！

question.en: What can I expect to find at the event?
question.id: Apa saja yang ada di event?
question.ja: 会場では何が楽しめる？
question.zh: 现场有什么好逛好玩的？

answer.en: You'll find merchandise booths, artist alleys, gaming zones, photo opportunities, stage performances, meet & greets with special guests, cosplay competitions, and much more! Check our Exhibitors page for the full list.
answer.id: Booth merchandise, artist alley, gaming zone, photo spot, panggung live, meet & greet guest spesial, kompetisi cosplay, dan banyak lagi. Cek halaman Exhibitors untuk daftar lengkapnya.
answer.ja: グッズブース、アーティストアレイ、ゲームゾーン、フォトスポット、ステージライブ、ゲストMeet & Greet、コスプレ大会など盛りだくさん！出展者一覧はこちら。
answer.ko: 굿즈 부스, 아티스트 앨리, 게임존, 포토존, 무대 공연, 스페셜 게스트 Meet & Greet, 코스프레 대회 등 다양해요! 전체 목록은 참가사 페이지에서 확인하세요.
answer.zh: 周边摊位、Artist Alley、游戏区、拍照打卡、舞台表演、嘉宾 Meet & Greet、Cosplay 比赛……太多了。完整名单看 参展商页面。

question.en: Will there be special guests or celebrity appearances?
question.ja: スペシャルゲストは来る？
question.zh: 会有特邀嘉宾或明星来吗？

answer.en: Yes! We invite special guests including voice actors, artists, content creators, and industry professionals. Guest announcements will be made on our social media and News page. Stay tuned!
answer.id: Ada! Kami undang voice actor, mangaka, content creator, dan figur ternama dari industri anime dan pop culture. Guest announcement ada di media sosial kami dan halaman News. Stay tuned!
answer.ja: はい！声優、イラストレーター、コンテンツクリエイター、業界関係者など。ゲスト発表はSNSとニュースページで。お楽しみに！
answer.ko: 네! 성우, 일러스트레이터, 콘텐츠 크리에이터, 업계 전문가 등을 초청해요. 게스트 공개는 소셜 미디어와 뉴스 페이지에서. 기대해 주세요!
answer.zh: 会！我们邀请了声优、插画师、内容创作者和行业大咖。嘉宾公布看社交媒体和 资讯页面。敬请关注！

question.en: How can I become an exhibitor or artist?
question.id: Bagaimana caranya menjadi exhibitor atau masuk artist alley?
question.ja: 出展者やアーティストとして参加するには？
question.zh: 怎么报名当参展商或创作者？

answer.en: To become an exhibitor or apply for the Artist Alley, please visit our Registration page or contact our team via WhatsApp for more information.
answer.id: Kunjungi halaman Registrasi atau hubungi tim kami via WhatsApp.
answer.ja: 登録ページから申し込むか、WhatsAppでお問い合わせください。
answer.ko: 등록 페이지에서 신청하거나 WhatsApp으로 문의해 주세요.
answer.zh: 去 报名页面 提交申请，或通过 WhatsApp 联系我们。

question.en: Are there age restrictions for the event?
question.ja: 年齢制限はある？

answer.en: The event is family-friendly and open to all ages. Children under a certain age may enter free when accompanied by a paying adult. Please check our Ticket page for specific age policies.
answer.id: Tidak ada. Event ini family-friendly, terbuka untuk semua umur. Anak-anak di bawah umur tertentu bisa masuk gratis jika ditemani orang dewasa yang memiliki tiket. Detail lengkap ada di halaman Tiket.
answer.ja: ファミリー向けイベントなので年齢制限なし。お子さまはチケットを持つ大人の同伴で無料入場できる場合があります。詳しくはチケットページで。
answer.ko: 전 연령 환영하는 가족 행사예요. 일정 나이 미만 어린이는 유료 성인과 함께하면 무료 입장할 수 있어요. 자세한 건 티켓 페이지에서 확인하세요.
answer.zh: 没有，全家都能来。符合条件的儿童在成人陪同下可免费入场。具体年龄规则看 门票页面。

question.en: Is there parking available at the venue?
question.ja: 駐車場はある？

answer.en: Yes, the venue provides parking facilities. However, we recommend arriving early as parking spaces fill up quickly, especially on weekends. Consider using public transportation or ride-sharing services.
answer.id: Ada. Sebaiknya datang lebih awal karena parkir cepat penuh, terutama di akhir pekan. Bisa juga menggunakan transportasi umum atau ride-sharing.
answer.ja: あります。ただし週末は混みやすいので、早めの来場がおすすめ。公共交通機関やライドシェアも便利です。
answer.ko: 네, 주차 시설이 있어요. 주말에는 빨리 찰 수 있으니 일찍 오시는 게 좋아요. 대중교통이나 차량 호출 서비스도 편리해요.
answer.zh: 有。不过周末容易满，建议早到。也可以考虑打车或坐公共交通。

question.en: Can I take photos or videos at the event?
question.id: Boleh foto dan video di event?
question.ja: 写真や動画を撮ってもいい？

answer.en: Personal photography and video recording are allowed and encouraged! Please be respectful when photographing cosplayers and always ask for permission. Professional or commercial recording requires written permission from the organizer.
answer.id: Tentu boleh! Foto dan video untuk keperluan pribadi sangat dianjurkan. Jika ingin memotret cosplayer, bersikaplah sopan dan minta izin terlebih dahulu. Untuk keperluan komersial, wajib minta izin tertulis dari penyelenggara.
answer.ja: 個人的な撮影は大歓迎！コスプレイヤーを撮るときは必ず声をかけてね。商用撮影は主催者の書面許可が必要です。
answer.ko: 개인 촬영 대환영이에요! 코스플레이어 촬영 시 꼭 동의를 구해 주세요. 상업 목적 촬영은 주최 측의 사전 서면 허가가 필요해요.
answer.zh: 可以，大力鼓励！拍 Cosplayer 时请先征得同意。商业用途拍摄需要主办方书面许可。

question.en: How can I stay updated about the event?
question.ja: 最新情報はどこでチェック？

answer.en: Follow us on Instagram @{{instagram}} for the latest updates, guest announcements, and exclusive content. You can also check our News page.
answer.id: Follow Instagram kami @{{instagram}} untuk update terbaru, guest reveal, dan konten eksklusif. Atau cek halaman News.
answer.ja: Instagram @{{instagram}}をフォローしてね。ゲスト発表や限定情報を配信中。ニュースページもチェック！
answer.ko: Instagram @{{instagram}}을 팔로우하면 게스트 공개, 독점 콘텐츠 등을 가장 먼저 볼 수 있어요. 뉴스 페이지도 확인해 보세요.
answer.zh: 关注 Instagram @{{instagram}}，第一时间获取嘉宾公布、独家内容等。也可以看 资讯页面。

question.en: How do I contact the organizer?
question.ja: 主催者への連絡方法は？

answer.en:
You can reach us through:

  • WhatsApp: Click here to chat

Visit our Help Center for more contact options.
answer.id:
Bisa lewat:

  • WhatsApp: Klik di sini
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

Atau kunjungi Help Center kami.
answer.ja:
こちらからどうぞ：

  • WhatsApp: ここからチャット
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

その他はヘルプセンターをご覧ください。
answer.ko:
아래 방법으로 연락해 주세요:

  • WhatsApp: 여기를 클릭해서 채팅
  • Email: {{contact_email}}

고객센터에서 더 많은 연락 방법을 확인할 수 있어요.
answer.zh:
这些方式都行：

  • Email: {{contact_email}}

更多联系方式见 帮助中心。

question.en: What is IICC?

answer.en: Indonesia International Cocoa Conference (IICC) is an international cocoa conference organized by the Indonesian Cocoa Association (ASKINDO). Since its inception, IICC has become the premier platform for cocoa industry stakeholders from around the world to meet, discuss, and forge partnerships. 2026 will mark the 9th edition of this conference.
answer.id: Indonesia International Cocoa Conference (IICC) adalah konferensi kakao internasional yang diselenggarakan oleh Asosiasi Kakao Indonesia (ASKINDO). Sejak pertama kali diadakan, IICC telah menjadi platform utama bagi pelaku industri kakao dari seluruh dunia untuk bertemu, berdiskusi, dan menjalin kemitraan. Tahun 2026 akan menjadi edisi ke-9 dari konferensi ini.

question.en: When and where is the 9th IICC held?
question.id: Kapan dan di mana IICC ke-9 diadakan?

answer.en: The 9th IICC will be held on July 22-24, 2026 in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. Yogyakarta stands out as an ideal location for the Indonesia International Cocoa Conference due to its strategic position near cocoa-producing regions, vibrant local artisan chocolate industry, strong academic research presence, and commitment to sustainable cocoa farming. Additionally, as the cultural heart of Java, Yogyakarta offers delegates a unique blend of tradition and hospitality, with convenient access from major Asian cities via an international airport located just 20 minutes from the city center.
answer.id: IICC ke-9 berlangsung tanggal 22-24 Juli 2026 di Yogyakarta, Indonesia. Kenapa Yogyakarta? Lokasinya dekat dengan sentra produksi kakao, punya komunitas artisan chocolate yang aktif, dan didukung riset akademis yang kuat di bidang kakao. Yogyakarta juga dikenal sebagai pusat budaya Jawa, jadi selain konferensi, peserta bisa merasakan langsung tradisi dan keramahan khas kota ini. Soal akses, bandara internasional Yogyakarta cuma 20 menit dari pusat kota, dengan koneksi penerbangan dari kota-kota besar di Asia.

question.en: Who should attend IICC?

answer.en: IICC is open to all parties involved in the cocoa industry, including farmers and cocoa cooperatives, traders and exporters, processors and grinders, chocolate makers, banks and investors, service providers (logistics, machinery, insurance), government and NGOs, as well as researchers and academics.
answer.id: IICC terbuka untuk semua pihak yang terlibat dalam industri kakao, termasuk petani dan koperasi kakao, trader dan eksportir, pengolah dan grinder, produsen cokelat, bank dan investor, penyedia jasa (logistik, mesin, asuransi), pemerintah dan NGO, serta peneliti dan akademisi.

question.en: What types of tickets are available?
question.id: Jenis tiket apa saja yang tersedia?

answer.en: There are 4 types of tickets available: (1) Conference Only - access to all conference sessions for 2 days, (2) Dinner Only - access to the exclusive IICC gala dinner, (3) Conference + Dinner - complete package for conference and gala dinner, (4) Table Dinner (8 Pax) - VIP table for 8 people at the gala dinner with company branding.
answer.id: Tersedia 4 jenis tiket: (1) Conference Only - akses ke semua sesi konferensi selama 2 hari, (2) Dinner Only - akses ke gala dinner eksklusif IICC, (3) Conference + Dinner - paket lengkap konferensi dan gala dinner, (4) Table Dinner (8 Pax) - meja VIP untuk 8 orang di gala dinner dengan branding perusahaan.

question.en: Is there an early bird discount?

answer.en: Yes! We offer early bird discounts of up to 17% for registrations before March 31, 2026. Early bird prices: Conference Only USD 500, Dinner Only USD 300, Conference + Dinner USD 750, and Table Dinner USD 2,500.
answer.id: Ya! Kami menawarkan diskon early bird hingga 17% untuk pendaftaran sebelum 31 Maret 2026. Harga early bird: Conference Only USD 500, Dinner Only USD 300, Conference + Dinner USD 750, dan Table Dinner USD 2,500.

question.en: How do I register?

answer.en: You can register through our official website by clicking the Register button on this page. You will be directed to the registration page to select your ticket type and make payment.
answer.id: Anda dapat mendaftar melalui website resmi kami dengan mengklik tombol Daftar di halaman ini. Anda akan diarahkan ke halaman registrasi untuk memilih jenis tiket dan melakukan pembayaran.

question.en: What language will be used during the conference?
question.id: Bahasa apa yang digunakan selama konferensi?

answer.en: The conference will use English as the primary language to accommodate international participants from 30+ countries. Some sessions may provide Indonesian translation.
answer.id: Konferensi akan menggunakan Bahasa Inggris sebagai bahasa utama untuk memfasilitasi peserta internasional dari 30+ negara. Beberapa sesi mungkin menyediakan terjemahan ke Bahasa Indonesia.

question.en: What is included in the Conference ticket?
question.id: Apa saja yang termasuk dalam tiket Conference?

answer.en: The Conference ticket includes access to all sessions and panel discussions for 2 days, networking sessions with participants from around the world, digital conference materials, lunch for all 2 conference days, coffee breaks, and certificate of attendance (for Conference + Dinner package).
answer.id: Tiket Conference mencakup akses ke semua sesi dan panel diskusi selama 2 hari, sesi networking dengan peserta dari seluruh dunia, materi konferensi dalam format digital, makan siang selama 2 hari konferensi, coffee break, dan sertifikat kehadiran (untuk paket Conference + Dinner).

question.en: Is accommodation included in the ticket?

answer.en: No, accommodation is not included in the ticket price. However, Yogyakarta offers a wide range of hotels for all budgets, from 5-star hotels to budget accommodations. We will provide a list of recommended hotels near the conference venue to registered participants.
answer.id: Tidak, akomodasi tidak termasuk dalam harga tiket. Namun, Yogyakarta menawarkan berbagai pilihan hotel untuk semua budget, dari hotel bintang 5 hingga penginapan ekonomis. Kami akan menyediakan daftar hotel rekomendasi yang dekat dengan venue konferensi kepada peserta yang sudah terdaftar.

question.en: Is there a dress code?

answer.en: For conference sessions, we recommend business casual or comfortable semi-formal attire. For the gala dinner, the dress code is smart casual or formal. Given Yogyakarta's tropical climate, light and comfortable clothing is highly recommended.
answer.id: Untuk sesi konferensi, kami menyarankan business casual atau pakaian semi-formal yang nyaman. Untuk gala dinner, dress code adalah smart casual atau formal. Mengingat Yogyakarta beriklim tropis, pakaian yang ringan dan nyaman sangat dianjurkan.

question.en: How can I become a sponsor or partner?
question.id: Bagaimana jika saya ingin menjadi sponsor atau partner?

answer.en: We welcome partnerships and sponsorships! Various sponsorship packages are available with different benefits, including branding, exhibition booths, and speaking opportunities. Please contact our team through the Contact page for more information.
answer.id: Kami menyambut baik kemitraan dan sponsorship! Berbagai paket sponsorship tersedia dengan benefit yang berbeda-beda, termasuk branding, booth exhibition, dan kesempatan berbicara. Silakan hubungi tim kami melalui halaman Kontak untuk informasi lebih lanjut.

question.en: What is the refund policy?

answer.en: All ticket purchases are final and non-refundable. However, tickets can be transferred to another person with prior notice to the organizer.
answer.id: Semua pembelian tiket bersifat final dan tidak dapat di-refund. Namun, tiket dapat ditransfer ke orang lain dengan pemberitahuan terlebih dahulu kepada penyelenggara.

question.en: When and where does {{event_title}} take place?

answer.en: {{event_title}} runs {{event_date}}, daily hours {{event_time}}, at {{event_location}}. Exact dates are confirmed once the venue contract closes.
answer.id: {{event_title}} digelar {{event_date}}, jam operasional {{event_time}}, di {{event_location}}. Tanggal pasti dikonfirmasi setelah kontrak venue selesai.

question.en: Who should attend?

answer.en: Enterprise teams sourcing AI, founders raising or selling, investors scouting, policy and academic delegations, and engineers who want to see live deployments. The event is built for B2B and B2G traffic, not consumer entertainment.
answer.id: Tim enterprise yang sedang sourcing AI, founder yang sedang fundraising atau berjualan, investor yang scouting, delegasi pemerintah dan akademisi, serta engineer yang ingin melihat deployment langsung. Event ini fokus B2B dan B2G, bukan hiburan konsumen.

question.en: How do I get a visitor pass?

answer.en: Visitor registration opens September 2026 on the Ticket page. Passes are sent by email and WhatsApp once payment clears.
answer.id: Pendaftaran pengunjung dibuka September 2026 di halaman Ticket. Pass dikirim lewat email dan WhatsApp setelah pembayaran terverifikasi.

question.en: What does an exhibitor booth cost?

answer.en: Standard booth: USD 5,000. Premium booth: USD 12,000. Pavilion booth: USD 30,000. Pricing covers the three-day run. Sales will share floor plans and zone availability after you submit a request.
answer.id: Booth Standard: USD 5.000. Premium: USD 12.000. Pavilion: USD 30.000. Harga mencakup tiga hari penyelenggaraan. Tim sales akan membagikan denah dan ketersediaan zona setelah Anda mengirim permintaan.

question.en: What sponsorship tiers are available?
question.id: Tier sponsorship apa saja yang tersedia?

answer.en: Silver USD 50,000, Gold USD 150,000, Platinum USD 300,000, Title Sponsor USD 1,000,000. Each tier includes branded zones, stage time, and curated business matching. Decks are shared after a short qualification call.
answer.id: Silver USD 50.000, Gold USD 150.000, Platinum USD 300.000, Title Sponsor USD 1.000.000. Tiap tier mencakup branded zone, slot panggung, dan akses business matching. Deck dikirim setelah panggilan kualifikasi singkat.

question.en: Which industry zones are on the floor?
question.id: Zona industri apa saja di lantai pameran?

answer.en: Eight zones: AI Robotics, Healthcare AI, Fintech AI, Smart City AI, Manufacturing AI, Autonomous Vehicles, AI and Energy, AI and Agriculture. Exhibitors pick their zone at booking.
answer.id: Delapan zona: AI Robotics, Healthcare AI, Fintech AI, Smart City AI, Manufacturing AI, Autonomous Vehicles, AI dan Energi, AI dan Agrikultur. Exhibitor memilih zona saat booking.

question.en: How does the Innovation Competition work?

answer.en: USD 100,000 total prize pool across four categories: Best AI Startup, Best AI Application, AI for Social Impact, and AI Robotics Innovation. Applications open mid 2026 with judging during the expo.
answer.id: Total hadiah USD 100.000 untuk empat kategori: Best AI Startup, Best AI Application, AI for Social Impact, dan AI Robotics Innovation. Pendaftaran dibuka pertengahan 2026, penjurian berlangsung selama event.

question.en: How is business matching organized?

answer.en: Pre-vetted buyers and suppliers fill out a profile in advance. The matching team books 30-minute meetings during the event. Visitor and exhibitor passes both unlock access.
answer.id: Buyer dan supplier mengisi profil terlebih dahulu. Tim matching menjadwalkan pertemuan 30 menit selama event. Pass pengunjung dan exhibitor sama-sama membuka akses.

question.en: Where do I stay, and how do I get to the venue?
question.id: Di mana menginap dan bagaimana akses ke venue?

answer.en: Sentul City is around 50 km south of central Jakarta. Hotel partner rates and airport transfer details ship with your confirmation email. Public transport options are listed on the Help Center.
answer.id: Sentul City berjarak sekitar 50 km dari pusat Jakarta. Tarif hotel partner dan transfer dari bandara dikirim bersama email konfirmasi. Opsi transportasi umum tersedia di Pusat Bantuan.

question.en: How do I reach the organizer?

answer.en: WhatsApp: tap to chat. Email: {email}. For press, use the media accreditation form on the Partners page.
answer.id: WhatsApp: klik untuk chat. Email: {email}. Untuk pers, gunakan formulir akreditasi media di halaman Partners.
